tiktok.caption: Billionaires pay 8.2% tax. You pay 22%. Here's the exact legal strategy — it's called Buy, Borrow, Die.

youtube_short.title: Why Billionaires Pay 8.2% Tax (You Pay 22%)
title_alternatives: Buy Borrow Die: How Billionaires Avoid Taxes
youtube_short.description:
The 400 richest Americans paid an average effective tax rate of just 8.2% — while most middle-class workers pay 22% or more. The strategy is called Buy, Borrow, Die, and it's completely legal. They buy appreciating assets, never sell them, borrow cash against their portfolio instead of taking a salary, and when they die, a rule called step-up in basis wipes out every unrealized gain their heirs would owe. You can't fully replicate it, but understanding it changes how you invest. Max your Roth IRA, harvest tax losses, and hold appreciating assets long-term — realize gains on your schedule, not the IRS's. #taxes #personalfinance #wealthbuilding
